name: ecoli_k12_mg1655_rhs_rearrangement_hotspot
description: Rhs family (rearrangement hot spot) gene clusters rhsA, rhsB, rhsC, rhsD, rhsE — five large (~3.7 kb) loci scattered across the chromosome that share ~99% identity in their core repetitive 'core'+'extension' segment. Drive homologous recombination and frequent rearrangements. Reads from the Rhs core must be treated as multi-mapping until PSV (extension-tip) disambiguation succeeds.
